name: MasterKodi AI Subs
changelog: Auto AI translation now ASKS for confirmation before starting (toggle: 'בקש אישור לפני תרגום AI אוטומטי'; manual picks and instant pool hits don't ask). Fixed the translation dying silently on long chunks (proxy timeouts are now retried, and a ticking clock keeps the progress dialog alive). subdl gets a longer timeout. Settings rebranded from DarkSubs to MasterKodi.
